personas.name: 职场妈妈 Sarah
personas.description: 在事业与家庭间拼命平衡的中产阶级职业女性
personas.ethnicity: 不限（白人/拉丁裔/亚裔均有代表性）
personas.state: 加州、德州、纽约州、华盛顿州
personas.occupation: 科技/金融/医疗/教育行业白领
personas.core_needs: 省时间、减轻心理负担、高效育儿、自我关怀

personas.name: 独立女性 Mia
personas.description: 享受生活、注重品质的单身/无孩职业女性
personas.state: 纽约、旧金山、西雅图、芝加哥
personas.occupation: 创意产业/科技/咨询/金融
personas.life_stage: 单身或恋爱中，无子女，事业上升期
personas.core_needs: 自我提升、社交体验、情绪价值消费、探索新品牌

personas.name: 中年焕新者 Jennifer
personas.description: 重新定义自我、追求健康与长寿的中年女性
personas.state: 佛罗里达、德州、科罗拉多、北卡
personas.occupation: 管理层/自由职业/小企业主
personas.life_stage: 子女已大或空巢期，围绝经期/更年期
personas.core_needs: 抗衰老/长寿、更年期健康、重新投资自我、优质体验

personas.name: 副业创业者 Aaliyah
personas.description: 身兼数职、追求财务自由的斜杠女性
personas.ethnicity: 非裔/拉丁裔为主，各族裔均有
personas.state: 亚特兰大、休斯顿、迈阿密、洛杉矶
personas.occupation: 全职工作 + 副业/小型电商/内容创作
personas.life_stage: 有稳定收入但渴望更多财务自由
personas.core_needs: 高效工具、自我品牌建设、社群归属感、被激励

personas.name: 健康优先者 Lisa
personas.description: 将健康与养生作为生活核心的女性
personas.state: 科罗拉多、加州、俄勒冈、亚利桑那
personas.occupation: 各行业，倾向于灵活工作制
personas.life_stage: 各阶段均有，健康意识觉醒后持续投入
personas.core_needs: 功能性营养、睡眠优化、身心平衡、科学护肤

forecasts.text_zh:
• 女性长寿市场爆发：从"管理症状"转向"根源抗衰"，卵巢健康成为新焦点
• "反过度优化"运动加速：女性拒绝被数据绑架，回归感性、快乐驱动的健康方式
• 功能性香氛、情绪化护肤等"情绪价值"品类快速增长
• 中产"紧张消费"加剧：女性更精明但仍愿意为真正有价值的产品/体验买单
forecasts.text_en:
• Women's longevity market explodes: shifting from symptom management to root-cause anti-aging, ovarian health as new focus
• Over-optimization backlash accelerates: women reject data-driven wellness, return to sensory, joy-driven health
• Functional fragrances, emotion-driven skincare and 'emotional value' categories grow rapidly
• Middle-class 'nervous spending' intensifies: women are savvier but still willing to pay for genuinely valuable products/experiences

forecasts.text_zh:
• 个性化营养成为主流：基于DNA/血液数据的定制补剂订阅将覆盖千万级用户
• 社区型健康体验替代个人化健身："健康派对"、社交型运动成为新常态
• AI购物助理初步普及：品牌需要优化"被AI推荐"的策略
• 女性生命周期全覆盖服务兴起：从青春期到更年期的一站式健康管理
forecasts.text_en:
• Personalized nutrition goes mainstream: DNA/blood-based custom supplement subscriptions will reach tens of millions
• Community wellness replaces solo fitness: 'wellness parties' and social sports become the new norm
• AI shopping assistants gain initial adoption: brands need 'AI recommendation' optimization strategies
• Full female lifecycle services emerge: one-stop health management from puberty through menopause

forecasts.text_zh:
• 孤独经济催生"归属感品牌"：能提供真实人际连接的品牌/服务溢价能力极强
• "隐形购物"成为常态：AI代理自动完成日常采购，品牌竞争焦点从"吸引消费者"转为"被AI选中"
• 植物基/功能性食品完成主流化：不再是"替代品"而是"首选"
• 女性健康市场向6000亿美元迈进，个性化、科学化、全周期成为行业标配
forecasts.text_en:
• Loneliness economy spawns 'belonging brands': brands/services offering authentic human connection command premium pricing
• 'Invisible shopping' becomes normal: AI agents handle routine purchases; brand competition shifts from attracting consumers to being selected by AI
• Plant-based/functional foods fully mainstream: no longer 'alternatives' but 'first choice'
• Women's wellness market marches toward $600B, with personalization, science-backing, and full lifecycle coverage as industry standards

forecasts.text_zh:
• 混合现实购物体验普及：AR/VR "试穿/试用"成为标准消费流程
• 生物化学级个性化健康：汗液/唾液传感器实时监测+AI实时调整健康方案
• "延长的中间人生"彻底改变市场分层：25-65岁的活跃消费阶段取代传统的"青年/中年/老年"分法
• 体验经济全面超越实物消费：旅行、社交健康、教育成长类支出成为女性最大消费品类
forecasts.text_en:
• Mixed reality shopping becomes universal: AR/VR 'try-before-buy' becomes standard
• Biochemical-level personalized health: real-time sweat/saliva sensors + AI-adjusted wellness plans
• 'Extended middle' completely reshapes market segmentation: 25-65 active consumption phase replaces traditional youth/middle-age/senior categories
• Experience economy fully surpasses physical goods: travel, social wellness, education/growth become women's largest spending categories
